feedback.description: Help us investigate by sharing diagnostic information.

route_not_found.title: Page not found
route_not_found.description: The address may be incorrect, or the page may have moved.

resource_not_found.title: Resource not found
resource_not_found.description: This resource does not exist, was moved, or is no longer available to you.

resource_gone.title: Resource no longer available
resource_gone.description: This resource was removed and cannot be restored from this address.

invalid_link.title: This link is not valid
invalid_link.description: Check that the complete link was copied, or return to the page where it was created.

expired_link.title: This link has expired
expired_link.description: Request a new link to continue.

authentication_required.title: Sign in required
authentication_required.description: Sign in to continue to this page.

session_expired.title: Your session has expired
session_expired.description: Sign in again to continue securely.

reauthentication_required.title: Confirm it is you
reauthentication_required.description: This action requires a recent sign-in.

auth_link_invalid.title: This sign-in link is not valid
auth_link_invalid.description: The link may already have been used or may be incomplete.

invite_invalid.title: This invitation cannot be used
invite_invalid.description: Ask the organization owner to send a new invitation.

account_locked.title: Your account is temporarily locked
account_locked.description: Wait before trying again, or contact support if you need help.

account_disabled.title: This account is disabled
account_disabled.description: Contact support to review the account status.

access_denied.title: Access denied
access_denied.description: Your account does not have access to this section. Contact an owner if you need access.

membership_required.title: Organization access required
membership_required.description: You need an active membership in this organization to continue.

action_forbidden.title: You cannot perform this action
action_forbidden.description: Your current permissions do not allow this operation.

resource_access_denied.title: This resource is restricted
resource_access_denied.description: You do not have permission to view this resource.

workspace_unavailable.title: Workspace unavailable
workspace_unavailable.description: This workspace does not exist or is no longer available to your account.

organization_unavailable.title: Organization unavailable
organization_unavailable.description: This organization does not exist or is no longer available to your account.

organization_suspended.title: This organization is suspended
organization_suspended.description: Access is paused. Contact an organization owner or support for details.

organization_archived.title: This organization is archived
organization_archived.description: Archived organizations are read-only and cannot be opened here.

feature_not_enabled.title: This feature is not enabled
feature_not_enabled.description: The feature is not available for this organization or plan.

maintenance_scheduled.title: Maintenance is scheduled
maintenance_scheduled.description: The service will be temporarily unavailable during the announced maintenance window.

maintenance_active.title: We are performing maintenance
maintenance_active.description: The service is temporarily unavailable. Check service status for progress.

service_unavailable.title: Service temporarily unavailable
service_unavailable.description: The service cannot complete requests right now. Try again shortly.

service_degraded.title: Some functions are unavailable
service_degraded.description: You can continue using unaffected parts of the service while we restore full operation.

system_waking.title: The service is starting
system_waking.description: This normally takes less than a minute. The page will retry automatically.

dependency_unavailable.title: A required service is unavailable
dependency_unavailable.description: This operation cannot continue until the dependent service recovers.

read_only_mode.title: Changes are temporarily paused
read_only_mode.description: You can view existing data, but changes cannot be saved right now.

unexpected_server_error.title: This page could not load
unexpected_server_error.description: An unexpected server error occurred. Try again, or send the diagnostic report if the problem continues.

unexpected_client_error.title: This page stopped working
unexpected_client_error.description: An unexpected application error occurred. Reload the page to continue.

request_timeout.title: The request took too long
request_timeout.description: The operation did not finish in time. Try again.

gateway_error.title: Upstream service error
gateway_error.description: A service returned an invalid response. Try again shortly.

chunk_load_failed.title: The application could not finish loading
chunk_load_failed.description: A newer application version may be available. Reload to update.

offline.title: No internet connection
offline.description: Check your connection. The page will retry when you are back online.

connection_lost.title: The connection was interrupted
connection_lost.description: Your unsaved changes may still be present. Reconnect before continuing.

connection_restoring.title: Restoring the connection
connection_restoring.description: The page will continue when the connection is stable.

unsupported_browser.title: This browser is not supported
unsupported_browser.description: Use a current version of Chrome, Safari, Firefox, or Edge.

javascript_required.title: JavaScript is disabled
javascript_required.description: Enable JavaScript for this site, then reload the page.

cookies_required.title: Cookies are disabled
cookies_required.description: Allow cookies for this site so we can keep you signed in securely.

storage_unavailable.title: Browser storage is unavailable
storage_unavailable.description: Check private browsing or site storage settings, then reload.

rate_limited.title: Too many requests
rate_limited.description: Wait a moment before trying again.

quota_exceeded.title: Usage limit reached
quota_exceeded.description: This organization has reached its current usage allowance.

ai_budget_exhausted.title: AI processing is paused
ai_budget_exhausted.description: The current AI budget has been used. Review the limit or continue without AI processing.

cooldown_active.title: This action is temporarily paused
cooldown_active.description: The action will be available again after the cooldown period.

aside.headline: A calmer place to manage accounting. Now with agents.
aside.subtitle: {brand} brings documents, postings, and reports into one workspace where accountants and AI agents can work together.

quote.text: Afframe replaced five tools and gave us back our Friday nights. Our team finally has time to advise clients, not chase receipts.
quote.author: Lukáš Krejčí

email.title: Sign in to {brand}
email.description: Enter your work email to continue.
email.label: Work email
email.contactSalesPrompt: Looking to get started with {brand} for your business?

password.title: Enter your password
password.description: Enter your password to continue to {brand}.
password.label: Password
password.magicLinkSentDescription: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device to continue.

mfa.title: Two-factor verification
mfa.description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app for {email}.
mfa.label: Verification code
mfa.recoveryDescription: Enter one of the recovery codes you saved when you turned on two-factor for {email}.

magicLink.label: Sign in with a magic link

password.title: Set up two-factor authentication
password.description: Confirm your password to begin enrolling an authenticator app.
password.label: Current password
password.errorMissingUri: Server did not return a TOTP URI. Try again.
password.errorMissingBackup: The server did not return backup codes. Two-factor cannot be enabled without recovery codes.

verify.title: Scan with your authenticator app
verify.description: Use Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or any TOTP app to scan the code, then enter the 6-digit code it generates.
verify.step1Description: Scan with your authenticator app, or tap the code to copy the setup URI to your clipboard.
verify.step2Description: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code it shows for {brand}.
verify.secretHint: Can't scan? Add this secret to your authenticator app manually.
verify.label: 6-digit code

backup.title: Save your backup codes
backup.description: These codes let you sign in if you lose your authenticator app. Each one works once. Store them in a password manager or print them — they will not be shown again.
backup.acknowledge: I have saved these backup codes somewhere safe. I understand they will not be shown again.
backup.errorNotAcknowledged: Confirm you saved your backup codes before continuing.

forgot.title: Forgot your password?
forgot.description: We'll send a reset link to your email if an account exists.
forgot.label: Work email

sent.title: Check your email
sent.description: If an account exists for {email}, a password-reset link is on the way.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.description: Choose a strong password of at least 12 characters.

invalidLink.title: Invalid link
invalidLink.description: This reset link is missing its token. Request a new one from the forgot-password page.

success.title: Password updated
success.description: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

errors.no-workspace-access: You are signed in but no workspace is linked to this account. Ask support for an invitation.
errors.signup-email-mismatch: Your signup invitation is for a different email than the account you're signed in as. Sign out and re-open the invite link.
errors.signup-session-expired: Your signup link expired. Ask support for a new invitation.
errors.invite-session-expired: Your invite link expired. Ask the inviter to resend it.
errors.missing-signup-token: The signup link is missing its token.
errors.missing-invite-token: The invite link is missing its token.
errors.expired: Your link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.invalid: Your link is invalid or has been tampered with.
errors.wrong_kind: Your link is the wrong type for this flow.
errors.disabled: This flow is currently disabled. Contact support.
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with your existing password instead.
errors.invalidCode: That code didn't match. Try again.
errors.loginSessionExpired: Your sign-in session expired. Please start over.
errors.resetSent: If an account exists, a reset link is on the way.
errors.couldNotSendReset: Could not send the reset email. Try again in a moment.

invites.tooMany: You can invite up to 50 people at once.

welcome.title: You're in. Let's get to work.
welcome.description: Confirm your invitation, issued by {brand} support and valid for 7 days.

mismatch.title: You're signed in as someone else
mismatch.description: You're signed in as {sessionEmail}. This signup link was issued for {claimEmail}.
mismatch.instruction: Sign out to continue with this signup link.

landing.title: Your invitation is ready
landing.description: Click below to continue setting up your account as {email}.
landing.descriptionGeneric: Click the button below to continue.

invalid.title: This link is invalid or has expired
invalid.description: The signup link has already been used, expired, or is invalid. Contact support to receive a new invitation.

welcome.title: You've been invited
welcome.description: Join the team on {brand} and pick up where everyone else left off.
welcome.signInExisting: Sign in to an existing account
welcome.footnote: By accepting, you agree to {brand}'s Terms and Privacy Policy. Invitation expires in 7 days.

mismatch.title: You're signed in as someone else
mismatch.description: You're signed in as {sessionEmail}. This invite link was issued for {claimEmail}.
mismatch.instruction: Sign out to continue with this invite link.

landing.title: Your invitation is ready
landing.descriptionGeneric: Click the button below to continue.

invalid.title: This link is invalid or has expired
invalid.description: The invitation link has already been used, expired, or is invalid. Contact your team admin to receive a new invitation.

consent.title: Authorize access
consent.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

scope.offlineAccess: Stay signed in while you are away
scope.accountingWrite: Propose accounting entries for your approval

selectOrganization.title: Select organization
selectOrganization.description: Choose the organization this authorization applies to.
selectOrganization.empty: This account has no active organization to authorize.
selectOrganization.failed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

profile.title: Tell us who you are
profile.description: We use this to personalize {brand} and how teammates see you.
profile.avatarWrongType: Use a PNG or JPG image.
profile.phoneHint: Used for account recovery and security alerts.

experience.title: How familiar are you with accounting?
experience.description: We'll tune the experience to your level. You can change this later.

bookkeeper.title: Bookkeeper
bookkeeper.description: I work with books day to day.

password.title: Choose a password
password.description: Pick a strong password of at least 12 characters. You'll use this with {email} to sign in.

workspace.title: Set up your workspace
workspace.description: A workspace is the home for your team and clients in {brand}.

plan.title: Pick a plan
plan.description: You can change plans anytime. No card required during beta.

team.title: Invite your team
team.description: Add people who'll work with you. You can always invite more later.
team.note: Invites are sent right away. You can always invite more teammates later from workspace settings.

toast.sentTitle: {count, plural, one {# invite sent} other {# invites sent}}
toast.sentDescription: Each invitation includes a link to join your workspace. If it doesn't arrive within a few minutes, ask your teammate to check their spam folder.
toast.failedTitle: {count, plural, one {# invite failed} other {# invites failed}}
toast.failedDescription: We couldn't send some invitations. You can invite those teammates again later from workspace settings.

done.title: You're all set
done.description: Your workspace is ready. Here's what's next.

nextSteps.title: Next steps
nextSteps.addOrgDescription: Set up a client book or your own business.
nextSteps.exploreAgentsDescription: See how agents can take routine work off your plate.

revalidate.title: Confirm your identity
revalidate.description: For your security, please re-enter your password before continuing.

errors.sessionExpired: Your onboarding session expired. Sign in to continue.
errors.savePlanFailed: Could not save your plan choice.
errors.persistOnboardingFailed: Could not finish setting up your account.
errors.uploadAvatarFailed: Could not upload your profile photo.
errors.noActiveWorkspace: We couldn't find your workspace. Sign in again to continue.
errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with your existing password instead.
errors.invalidInput: Some fields are invalid. Check the form and try again.
errors.inviteEmailMismatch: This invitation is addressed to a different email. Sign out and open the link again with the invited address.

quote.text: If nobody is complaining, either everything works or the notification system doesn't.
quote.author: Source

password.description: Enter your password to continue to {brand} Admin.

createOrg.title: Add an organization
createOrg.lookupDescription: Enter the IČO to prefill details from the public registries (ARES, DPH).
createOrg.detailsDescription: Confirm the details and accounting setup. A ready-to-book entity is created.

errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Sign in again.
errors.noActiveWorkspace: No workspace to create the organization in.
errors.invalidInput: Some fields are invalid. Check and try again.
errors.createFailed: Could not create the organization. Try again.
errors.REGIME_AMBIGUOUS: Choose an accounting regime for this legal form.
errors.REGIME_NOT_ALLOWED: That regime is not permitted for this legal form.
errors.REGIME_CONFLICT: This legal form requires double-entry bookkeeping.
errors.SINGLE_ENTRY_VAT_PAYER: A VAT payer cannot keep single-entry bookkeeping (§1f).
errors.NONPROFIT_DOUBLE_ENTRY_UNSUPPORTED: Nonprofit double-entry is not supported yet.
errors.MISSING_PERIOD_START: Provide a start date for the first period.
errors.VAT_PAYER_REQUIRES_DIC: A VAT payer requires a DIČ.
errors.INVALID_FISCAL_YEAR_START: Daňová evidence uses the calendar year.
errors.OSS_REQUIRES_VAT_REGISTRATION: OSS requires VAT registration (payer / identified person).

favorites.heading: Favorites
favorites.emptyHint: Star a page to pin it to this overview.

help.supportAccessTooltip: Lets our support team sign in to this company for 7 days to help troubleshoot. Turn it off any time to revoke.
help.supportAccessOn: Support access on — our team can sign in for 7 days.
help.supportAccessOff: Support access off — our team can no longer sign in.
help.supportAccessError: Couldn't change support access. Try again.

signOut.title: Sign out?
signOut.description: You'll be returned to the sign-in page and need to sign in again to access your workspace.
